prompt: I have 8 TypeScript packages (shared utils, 3 microservices, 2 React apps, a CLI, and a types package). Currently they're all separate repos with duplicated CI configs and version drift. I want to consolidate them into a monorepo. What tool should I use and how do I set it up? Also need CI that only builds what changed.
assertions: Recommends a specific workspace manager (pnpm, npm, or yarn) with reasoning
Recommends a specific orchestrator (Turborepo or Nx) with reasoning for this scale
Provides actual pnpm-workspace.yaml or equivalent config content
Provides turbo.json or nx.json pipeline/task config content
Includes CI workflow snippet with affected-only builds
Mentions migration strategy for preserving git history
Mentions remote caching (Vercel Remote Cache or Nx Cloud)
